more.title: Chivayo’s frozen assets in South Africa: A wife’s success exposes ZACC as a compromised, toothless bulldog
more.description: History creates unlikely heroes where a corrupt state fails. The spectacle of a South African High Court effectively dismantling the “billionaire” playground of Wicknell Chivayo in a single afternoon provides a devastatingly clear mirror to the state of accountability in Zimbabwe.
